name: Harry
learning_in_progress_skills: Vector DB Scaling at Production Volume
_note_on_learning_expansion: This expanded list of learning_in_progress_skills was added by scanning what actually shows up repeatedly across the 19 real job postings' Gemini-extracted requirements. These are industry-common skills for ML/AI/GenAI Engineer roles, NOT things Harry has hands-on production experience with - they exist here so the fit-score and gap-advice features can surface them as concrete, realistic learning targets rather than missing them entirely. Move any of these to core_strength_skills only once genuinely used in a real project.
_note_on_learning_skills: Harry confirmed he worked on the same projects/platform (DELight) as the colleague whose resume skills were referenced, so those tools were moved into core_strength_skills. Recommend Harry stays ready to speak concretely to specific metrics/systems from that reference if they come up in an interview, since those are what get probed at that stage.

notable_projects.title: OD (Outlier Detection) layer integration
notable_projects.summary: Integrated a standalone outlier detection service into delight-services with full JWT auth, Casbin RBAC, audit logging, and rate limiting; live-tested all endpoints on production.

notable_projects.title: Temporal workflow engine integration
notable_projects.summary: Implemented Temporal workflow integration, diagnosing and fixing a TLS connection issue causing h2 FRAME_SIZE_ERROR through an AWS ALB.

notable_projects.title: MongoDB Data Anomaly Report API
notable_projects.summary: Built a 4-endpoint FastAPI service deriving anomaly findings at query time from profiler tables, covering 13 acceptance criteria.

notable_projects.title: Dagster concurrent execution bug fix
notable_projects.summary: Debugged a concurrent asset execution status bug in the Dagster orchestration layer involving run_id pinning and terminal-state promotion logic.

notable_projects.title: Poetry to pip migration
notable_projects.summary: Migrated delight-services from Poetry to pip; diagnosed a production deployment failure caused by private wheel git URLs baked into wheel METADATA failing on EC2 due to missing credentials.

notable_projects.title: File upload-to-S3 ingestion API
notable_projects.summary: Built a file upload-to-S3 API for data ingestion as part of the DELight platform's ingestion layer.

notes: 3.5 YOE backend engineer transitioning toward GenAI/ML roles; strong in production backend/pipeline engineering, actively building RAG/LLM/vector DB/document-intelligence skills. Some skills in learning_in_progress_skills were added from a colleague's resume as aspirational/exposure skills, not proven experience.

scoring_weights._note: Must sum to 1.0. Adjust these to change what the fit score prioritizes - e.g. raise experience_fit_weight if you'd rather filter out jobs outside your experience range more aggressively, or raise core_skill_weight to prioritize pure skill match over experience fit.
